issues: In the transition 'Cut protein into pieces', the precondition "protein_packaging == 'unpackaged'" is present, but 'protein_packaging' is missing from the from_conditions.
In the transition 'Place protein in hot pan', the precondition "protein_packaging == 'unpackaged'" is present, but 'protein_packaging' is missing from the from_conditions.
recommended_fixes: Add 'protein_packaging': 'unpackaged' to the from_conditions of the 'Cut protein into pieces' transition.
Add 'protein_packaging': 'unpackaged' to the from_conditions of the 'Place protein in hot pan' transition.
